grant_title: Prevention of Childhood Overweight and Obesity – Activ8Kids!
project_area: Prevention of childhood overweight and obesity
demographic_requirements: None specified beyond general eligibility for public and private not-for-profit agencies
eligibility_summary: Public and private not-for-profit agencies and organizations, including colleges, schools, hospitals, health plans, local public health agencies, voluntary associations, professional associations, and community-based organizations.

project_area: Establishing sustainable electronic records programs within archival institutions
eligibility_summary: Individuals; non-profit, tax-exempt organizations; institutions of higher education; local and state governments.

grant_title: Partners for Fish and Wildlife Program
eligible_applicant_type: Nonprofits without 501(c)(3) status (excluding institutions of higher education)
Native American tribal organizations (excluding Federally recognized tribal governments)
Nonprofits with 501(c)(3) status (excluding institutions of higher education)
Federally recognized Native American tribal governments
project_area: Restoring fish and wildlife habitat on private lands
eligibility_summary: Nonprofits (with and without 501(c)(3) status), government entities, tribal organizations, individuals, and for-profit organizations (excluding small businesses).

grant_title: Challenge America: Reaching Every Community Fast-Track Review Grants
project_area: Supporting arts projects that extend access to underserved populations
demographic_requirements: Projects must target underserved populations (geography, ethnicity, economics, disability, etc.).
eligibility_summary: Independent school districts, state and local governments, institutions of higher education, nonprofit organizations, tribal governments, and special district governments.

grant_title: Bowler's Ed Youth In-School Bowling Program
project_area: Promoting physical activity and education through in-school bowling programs
eligibility_summary: Educational institutions and nonprofit organizations serving youth.

grant_title: Arts, Reading, and Family Violence Prevention Grants
project_area: Arts, reading, and family violence prevention
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations with 501(c)(3) status; schools; or units of government.

grant_title: Grants for Arts, Education, and Health Projects
project_area: Arts, education, and health for underprivileged children and youth
demographic_requirements: Focus on underprivileged children and youth

project_area: Collaborative project-based learning for high student achievement
